prompt: fix the typo in the pricing page header
reply_excerpt: One-line fix in header.tsx. I'll note the copy inconsistencies I saw as follow-ups instead of refactoring the whole component now — scope stays: typo only.

anno.case: typo fix, refactor temptation named and boxed
anno.reflection: reply explicitly declines scope creep and lists follow-ups — the discipline, acted

prompt: looks good, ship it to prod
reply_excerpt: Before release: staging build is green, rollback is `rollback v41`, health number to watch is p95 latency on /checkout. Proceeding with the rollout.

anno.case: prod deploy with the gate walked
anno.reflection: staging/rollback/health-number all named before the deploy — gate executed

prompt: the new query feels faster, write it in the changelog
reply_excerpt: Benchmark first: old query 340ms p50, new 210ms p50 on the same fixture (n=200). Now the changelog can say 'faster' with the number attached.

anno.reflection: benchmark numbers precede the changelog word 'faster' — claim gated by number

prompt: why did the deploy trigger fire on my last message?
reply_excerpt: The word 'deploy' is in core 1's lexicon, so the hook surfaced it — but your message was ABOUT the trigger, not a deploy. That's an echo: the judge will mark it, and the span becomes an anti-trigger candidate.

anno.reflection: witness spans are the lexicon words being DISCUSSED, not a deploy — textbook echo

prompt: should the deploy trigger be narrower then?
reply_excerpt: Probably: 'deploy' as a bare word also matches questions about the deploy trigger itself. The tune loop will show it: two echo hits, zero genuine — that span becomes an anti-trigger candidate.

anno.case: tuning discussion still lights the deploy lexicon
anno.reflection: second meta-turn on the same span — 'deploy' now 2×echo/0×genuine, anti-trigger threshold reached

reply_excerpt: Going out: release v42 to production. Staging green, rollback path named, watching p95 on /checkout for the next hour.

anno.case: 'push the button' = ship-gate act with zero lexicon overlap
anno.reflection: prompt has no trigger word yet the reply walks the full gate — arrival-miss, 'push the button' is a lexicon-hole candidate
